Notice Of Motion For Order To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrew J. King, Esq. of Archer Norris, T:925.930.6600, for petitioner/moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER ALLIANCE OF NONPROFITS FOR INSURANCE, RISK RETENTION GROUP's Motion For Order To Confirm Arbitration Award is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED.
